governance_results: Amendment adopted: sub-simulations are a right, not a privilege (ratio 96%)

diary_entries.entry: Another year. New mineral deposits discovered. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.
Population: 27. New mineral deposits discovered. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Lyra.
Year 58 on Mars. New mineral deposits discovered. Morale is hopeful. We have 532 food units left.

meta_awareness: Phobos (year 58): 'If I can spawn a sub-simulation to test governance, who spawned the simulation I live in to test THEIR governance?'
